product: AI Material Management Platform (AI物料中台)
product_description: Enterprise-grade material standardization management and approval platform. Manages a five-level standard hierarchy (Category Library -> Category -> Product Name -> Attribute -> Brand) with full lifecycle control for materials through application workflows (new material -> stop purchase -> stop use). Features AI-powered governance, semantic matching via vector retrieval, and a unified LLM gateway supporting multi-provider deployment (DashScope/Azure OpenAI/vLLM/Ollama). Supports both SaaS cloud and private化部署.

warning.name: Warning Amber
warning.usage: Warnings, pending review, AI low confidence

typography.mono_font: JetBrains Mono, SF Mono, Consolas, monospace

tech_stack.frontend: React 18 + TypeScript 5 + Ant Design 5 + Vite 5 + Zustand 4 + TanStack Query 5 + React Router 6
tech_stack.backend: FastAPI 0.128+ (Python 3.11+, asyncio原生) + Pydantic v2 + SQLAlchemy 2.0
tech_stack.db: PostgreSQL 15+ (业务schema + tracer独立schema) + Qdrant向量数据库 (混合检索: Dense+Sparse BM25)
tech_stack.llm: 统一模型网关 - DashScope(Qwen3-Max) / Azure OpenAI / 本地vLLM / Ollama, OpenAI兼容格式
tech_stack.embedding: text-embedding-3-small (OpenAI) 或本地 BGE 模型, 维度 256/768 可选
tech_stack.deployment: Docker Compose (私有化) / 阿里云 OSS (SaaS) + Nginx负载均衡
tech_stack.observability: AITracer自研链路追踪框架 (tracer.spans衡) + structlog JSON日志 -> ELK

verification.test_scope: E2E browser tests covering CRUD flows, AI trigger points, and approval workflows

features.name: Category Library Management
features.description: CRUD operations for category library (top-level container). Only super admin can operate. Fields: name, auto-generated code, description, optional library admin assignment.

features.name: Category Management with AI Governance
features.description: Hierarchical category CRUD (up to 3 levels). AI governance: import Excel -> AI analyze -> standardize categories (name/code/level mapping). AI category matching: input product name -> output full-level category path with confidence score.

features.name: Product Name Management
features.description: CRUD for product names with auto-generated codes. Fields: name, unit, aliases, definition, description examples, up to 3 example images. Strongly bound to category and attributes. Extended with PM-prefixed product name codes (PM + 8-digit sequential counter, no reuse) and status column (active/inactive) with soft delete support.

features.name: Attribute Management with AI Governance
features.description: Attribute CRUD per product name. AI attribute governance: import Excel -> AI analyze -> standardize attributes (name/type/options/defaults). AI attribute recommendation: select product name -> auto-recommend attributes with sources (category common attrs, historical data, GB standards). Version control with change logs.

features.name: Brand Management
features.description: Brand CRUD with auto-generated codes. Supports logo upload. Fields: name, code (immutable), description, logo.

features.name: Material Library Management
features.description: Top-level material container CRUD (super admin only). Fields: name, auto-generated code, description, optional library admin. Deletion only allowed when empty. Extended with single admin assignment and category library association.

features.name: Material Management with AI Governance
features.description: Material CRUD within category system. AI material governance: import Excel -> AI clean/structure/attribute-extract -> preview -> batch write with rollback within 24h. Auto-generated material codes.

features.name: AI Natural Language Material Addition
features.description: Input natural language material description -> AI analyze -> auto-link category/product name -> recommend attribute values -> preview -> create material. Includes image understanding for supplementary input.

features.name: AI Vector Similarity Material Matching
features.description: On material creation, perform hybrid vector search (dense semantic + sparse BM25) against existing materials. Score综合: text Jaccard 40% + semantic 40% + brand 20%. Thresholds: >=0.90 highly duplicate, >=0.75 suspicious, <0.75 normal. Cold start: disable matching when <100 materials in library.

features.name: New Material Category Application Workflow
features.description: Material manager submits -> department head approval -> asset management approval. Supports simple approval vs multi-node workflow (configurable). Approved -> auto-create category in library. Reject -> return to applicant with reason.

features.name: New Material Code Application Workflow
features.description: Material manager submits -> approval -> material auto-added to catalog. Reject -> return with reason. Includes reference mall link, 3 required images.

features.name: Material Stop Purchase Application
features.description: After approval, material status -> stop_purchase (not selectable in purchase orders). Also supports admin manual override with exemption reason. Displays status badge in material list.

features.name: Material Stop Use Application
features.description: Precondition: material must be stop_purchased and archived. Approval flow similar to stop purchase. After approval -> material status -> stopped. Cannot be reverted.

features.name: User Management (HCM Sync)
features.description: User list synced from HCM, view-only. Displays: ID, username, unit, department, team, account ownership. Supports add/edit/reset password/delete local users.

features.name: Role and Permission Management
features.description: Role CRUD with enable/disable. Role-user binding. Feature permission configuration: directory/button/API-level access control covering material archives, attribute management, material library modules. Extended with auto-generated role codes in ROLE_### format (sequential, non-reusable).

features.name: System Configuration
features.description: System info (name, icon). Reason options maintenance (stop purchase/stop use reason lists). Approval mode switch: simple approval vs multi-node workflow.

features.name: LLM Gateway (Model Management)
features.description: Admin UI for model configuration: add/edit/disable models (DashScope/Azure/vLLM/Ollama). AES-256 encrypted API key storage. Per-capability model mapping with hot-switch (no restart). Fallback model auto-switch on timeout/5xx. Connection test on save.

features.name: AI Tracing Infrastructure (AITracer)
features.description: Self-developed AI链路追踪: @trace decorator -> Span tree (trace_id root, chain/llm/tool/retriever/embedding spans). Async批量写入 tracer.spans. Prompt version registry. Debug UI at /debug/trace (dev only). Production blocked unless AI_DEBUG=true.

features.name: Material State Machine
features.description: Enforced state transitions: normal -> stop_purchase -> stop_use (no backward skipping). State change only via approved workflow or super admin with exemption reason logged.

features.name: Operational Audit Log
features.description: All write operations logged: user/resource/action/before_value/after_value/timestamp/source (human/AI/system). Log list with filters (time range, type, resource, user). Change detail with before/after diff. Role-based visibility. Export to Excel for compliance.

features.name: Rule Engine (Layer 2 Deterministic Rules)
features.description: Deterministic rule engine for material governance, executed before AI models to reduce LLM cost. Six rule categories: unit standardization (kg/KG/公斤 -> kg), brand alias normalization (苹果/Apple/APPLE -> Apple), title format cleaning (strip special chars, extra spaces, illegal prefixes), enum value validation (check attribute values against allowed options), required field check (verify mandatory attributes are filled), and blacklist/whitelist filtering (keyword-based block or pass). Each rule has category, pattern/value/options fields, priority ordering, and enabled/disabled state. Evaluate endpoint accepts material fields and returns per-rule pass/fail results. Backend CRUD APIs for categories and rules. Frontend management UI with super_admin-only editing, read-only access for regular users, and zh-CN/en-US i18n.

features.name: Material Library Code Rule Management (Backend)
features.description: Material library-level custom material code rule management. Enables defining per-library code generation rules composed of multiple segments (fixed text, category path, attribute codes, date, serial number). Supports rule version management (edit generates new version, never overwrites history), code generation engine with serial number strategies (length, start, step, scope), batch recoding preview and execution with conflict detection, code mapping persistence, and batch rollback with operation logging. 6 new tables: material_library (extended with auto_code_enabled, recode_enabled), material_code_rule_version, material_code_serial, material_code_change_batch, material_code_change_detail, material_code_mapping. 12+ new API endpoints covering library CRUD with code rule config, rule version CRUD, recode preview, recode execute, mapping query, and rollback.

features.name: Material Library Code Rule Management (Frontend)
features.description: Frontend pages for material library-level code rule management. New material library creation page with code rule configuration wizard (segment builder with fixed text, category path, attribute codes, date, serial number segments), live preview showing generated example codes, and serial number strategy settings. Material library detail tabs: current code rule view, version history list with status (draft, active, deprecated), edit rule form generating new version with change reason, recode preview table (old code, new code, status, error reason), recode execution confirmation, code mapping history list with filters, batch rollback UI with risk warnings, and Excel export for code mappings. zh-CN/en-US i18n throughout.

features.name: Category Management Tree View and Bulk Import
features.description: Hierarchical tree display for categories with expand/collapse navigation across three levels (一级类目/二级类目/三级类目). Bulk import with downloadable CSV template (columns: 一级类目, 二级类目, 三级类目). AI one-click import via popup input dialog (10+ lines visible, scrollable, auto-focus at cursor). Backend batch import processing with validation, duplicate detection, and rollback support. Frontend tree visualization using Ant Design Tree component with search, filter, and inline edit capabilities.

features.name: Backend Category Recognition Agent
features.description: Simple async workflow that calls AsyncOpenAI with configurable model (default: qwen3.6-plus) to recognize categories from unstructured natural language input. Parses free-form text describing product categories and maps them to the existing category hierarchy (一级/二级/三级). Returns structured category path with confidence scores. Integrates with the existing LLM gateway for provider/model selection. Supports both single-input and batch recognition modes.

features.name: AI Agent Configuration
features.description: Unified AI agent configuration interface in the AI Management section. Configure AI provider (Qwen/千问, DeepSeek, Moonshot/月之暗面, etc.), model selection via dropdown with manual input fallback, and API key management with masked display. Settings apply system-wide to all AI features (category recognition, material analysis, attribute recommendation, etc.). Provider presets with sensible defaults for common providers. Model capability hints and compatibility warnings.

features.name: Role Code Auto-Generation
features.description: When creating a new role, automatically generate a role code in format ROLE_### (e.g., ROLE_001, ROLE_002). The counter increments sequentially from the highest existing role code number. Deleted role codes are not reused. Backend auto-generation logic on role creation; frontend displays the auto-generated code as read-only field.

features.name: Material Library Admin Single-Select and Category Library Association
features.description: Material library management extended with two new fields: (1) material_library_admin_id -- a single-select foreign key to the role table, restricting the library to exactly one admin role; (2) category_library_id -- a single-select foreign key to the category library table, linking each material library to exactly one category library. Backend schema changes, CRUD API updates, and frontend form integration with single-select dropdown components.

features.name: Material Library Permission Isolation
features.description: Material library admins can only view and manage material libraries and materials that they are assigned as admin for. Backend API filtering enforces that GET /api/v1/material-libraries and GET /api/v1/materials queries are automatically scoped to the logged-in user's admin libraries. Super admins can see all libraries. Frontend sidebar, navigation, and list pages reflect only accessible libraries.

features.name: Category Management UI Layout Refactor
features.description: Refactor the category management frontend page layout to match the existing material management page layout style. Use the same structural patterns: page header with title and action buttons, DataTable with consistent column styling, create/edit forms in modal dialogs, search/filter bar, pagination, empty state, and dark-theme CSS variable utilities. Apply to the category list page and any create/edit category dialogs.

features.name: Product Name Code and Status Management
features.description: Extend product name management with: (1) PM-prefixed product name code in format PM######## (8-digit zero-padded sequential counter, e.g., PM00000001), auto-generated on creation, never recycled; (2) status column with values active/inactive; (3) status toggle edit allowing users to switch between active and inactive; (4) soft delete that deactivates the product name without removing the record (sets status to inactive, code preserved). Backend: extend product_name model with code (unique, non-null) and status fields; add sequence counter; add PATCH toggle and soft-delete endpoints. Frontend: add code column (read-only, auto-displayed), add status switch, connect to toggle and delete APIs.

Implement /ai/token-usage as a simple statistics dashboard aggregating call count, capability distribution, and model distribution from existing /api/v1/debug/trace data

sprints.title: Backend Rule Engine: DB Tables, CRUD APIs, and Evaluate Endpoint
features: F21-RuleCategory model: id, slug (unit_normalization, brand_alias, title_cleaning, enum_validation, required_field_check, blackwhite_list), display_name_zh, display_name_en, description_zh, description_en, icon, sort_order, created_at

F21-Rule model: id, category_id (FK to RuleCategory), name, description, pattern (regex or keyword), value (replacement or target), options (JSON for enum lists, whitelist/blacklist arrays), priority (integer for execution order), enabled (boolean), created_at, updated_at

F21-Seed migration: auto-populate all 6 RuleCategory rows on first startup, plus at least 2 default Rule examples per category (12+ seeded rules total covering kg normalization, Apple brand alias, title whitespace strip, sample enum options, sample required fields, sample blacklist keywords)
F21-GET /api/v1/rules/categories: list all rule categories with rule counts, sorted by sort_order
F21-CRUD /api/v1/rules: GET (list with ?category_id filter, ?search query, ?enabled filter, pagination), POST (create), GET /:id (detail), PUT /:id (update), DELETE /:id
F21-PATCH /api/v1/rules/:id/toggle: toggle enabled/disabled state for a single rule

F21-POST /api/v1/rules/evaluate: accept a JSON body with material fields (name, brand, unit, attributes dict), run all enabled rules in priority order grouped by category, return structured result array with category_slug, rule_id, rule_name, passed (boolean), message (human-readable zh-CN explanation), and suggestion (corrected value if applicable)
F21-Pydantic v2 schemas: RuleCategoryRead, RuleCreate, RuleUpdate, RuleRead, RuleToggle, EvaluateRequest, EvaluateResult, EvaluateResponse
F21-All rule write endpoints (POST, PUT, DELETE, PATCH toggle) require super_admin role check via existing auth middleware

sprints.title: Frontend Rule Engine UI: Management Pages with i18n and Access Control

F21-Route /rules/categories: rule category list page showing all 6 categories as cards or table rows with icon, display name (i18n), description, and rule count badge; clicking a category navigates to the filtered rule list

F21-Route /rules: rule list page with DataTable showing columns for name, category, pattern/value preview, priority, enabled toggle switch, and actions; supports filtering by category_id dropdown, search by name/pattern, and pagination
F21-Enabled/disabled toggle: inline Switch component in the rule list that calls PATCH /api/v1/rules/:id/toggle; only visible to super_admin, disabled for regular users

F21-Route /rules/new: create rule form with fields for category (select), name, description, pattern, value, options (JSON editor or tag input depending on category), priority (number), and enabled (checkbox); form validation with required fields
F21-Route /rules/:id/edit: edit rule form pre-populated from GET /api/v1/rules/:id; same layout as create form

F21-Super admin access control: all create/edit/delete/toggle actions wrapped with SuperAdminRoute guard or conditional rendering using existing auth context; regular users see read-only rule list without action buttons
F21-zh-CN and en-US i18n keys added to existing i18n.ts: module name, page titles, table column headers, form labels, validation messages, toast notifications, and empty state messages
F21-Confirmation dialog before rule deletion with rule name displayed

sprints.title: Material Code Rule: Data Models, Backend APIs, and Code Generation Engine

verification.command: pytest -q or curl/httpx against /api/v1/material-libraries and /api/v1/code-rules endpoints

features: F22-Database tables: material_code_rule_version (id, library_id, version_no, rule_name, rule_config JSON with segments, separator, status, change_reason), material_code_serial (id, library_id, rule_version_id, scope_key, current_value), material_code_change_batch (id, library_id, old_rule_version_id, new_rule_version_id, change_mode, total_count, success_count, failed_count, status), material_code_change_detail (id, batch_id, material_id, old_code, new_code, status, error_message), material_code_mapping (id, library_id, material_id, old_code, new_code, old_rule_version_id, new_rule_version_id, batch_id, status)
F22-Extend material_library table: add auto_code_enabled, recode_enabled, current_rule_version_id fields
F22-Extend material_master table: add original_code, previous_code, code_rule_version_id, code_change_count, code_status fields
F22-POST /api/v1/material-libraries: create library with embedded code rule config, auto-generates rule version V1 as active
F22-GET /api/v1/material-libraries: list with code rule summary columns
F22-GET /api/v1/material-libraries/:id: detail including current_rule_version_id and library stats
F22-PUT /api/v1/material-libraries/:id: update library basic info (code rule not editable here)
F22-GET /api/v1/material-libraries/:id/code-rules/current: return active rule version with parsed segments
F22-GET /api/v1/material-libraries/:id/code-rules/versions: paginated version list with status, created_by, effective_time
F22-POST /api/v1/material-libraries/:id/code-rules/versions: create new rule version (draft) with rule_name, rule_config JSON, change_reason
F22-GET /api/v1/material-libraries/:id/code-rules/versions/:versionId: full rule version detail with segments

F22-Code generation engine: generate_material_code(tenant_id, library_id, material, rule_version) function handling fixed text, category_path (multi-level concatenation), attribute codes (with value-to-code mapping), date formatting, serial number (with scope, padding, concurrency-safe row-level lock)
F22-Serial number strategy: configurable length (1-10), start value, step, padding (left_zero), scope (global/category/category_attribute/year/month), reset by year/month
F22-Code validation: format check (uppercase letters, digits, hyphen, underscore), uniqueness check (tenant_id + material_code unique index), attribute completeness check, max length check (64 chars)

sprints.title: Batch Recoding: Preview, Execution, and Rollback APIs

verification.command: pytest -q or curl against recode and rollback endpoints

features: F22-POST /api/v1/material-libraries/:id/code-rules/versions/:versionId/recode-preview: generate preview mapping for all or selected materials, return batch_id with total_count, success_count, failed_count, and error list (material_id, old_code, new_code, error_message); validates attribute completeness and code uniqueness per new rule
F22-GET /api/v1/material-code-change-batches/:batchId: get batch status and summary
F22-GET /api/v1/material-code-change-batches/:batchId/preview: get detailed preview rows (material_id, material_name, old_code, new_code, status, error_message)

F22-POST /api/v1/material-code-change-batches/:batchId/execute: execute the batch recode -- update material_master with new_code, save original_code/previous_code chain, update code_rule_version_id, increment code_change_count, persist material_code_mapping records, update material_code_serial as needed; use row-level lock for serial number; batch-mode for large datasets (500 per transaction)

F22-POST /api/v1/material-code-change-batches/:batchId/rollback: revert batch -- restore material_code from previous_code, shift previous_code to original_code, decrement code_change_count, mark mapping records as rolled_back; require confirmation; warn if new_code may be referenced externally
F22-GET /api/v1/material-libraries/:id/code-mappings: paginated mapping list with filters (old_code, new_code, batch_id, time_range); supports export

F22-Concurrency safety: row-level locking on material_code_serial with FOR UPDATE; unique index on (tenant_id, material_code) as final safety net; recoding lock on library (status=recoding blocks new material creation and rule editing)
F22-All code change operations logged to audit_log with before/after values

sprints.title: Frontend: Create Material Library with Code Rule Configuration
features: F23-Update /materials/libraries (or /material-libraries) create dialog/page to include code rule configuration section, visible only when auto_code_enabled is on
F23-Code rule segment builder: visual interface to add/remove/reorder segments; each segment has type selector (固定文本, 类目路径编码, 属性编码, 日期, 流水号) and type-specific config inputs

F23-Segment types: fixed text (literal value input), category path (level selector 1/2/3, per-level length input), attribute code (attribute name + value-to-code mapping table with add/remove rows), date (format selector: YYYY, YYMM, YYYYMMDD), serial number (length, start, scope selector: 全局/按类目/按类目+属性/按年/按月)
F23-Separator configuration: optional single-character separator between segments
F23-Live code preview: real-time example code generation as user configures segments, using mock material data (e.g., category path, test attribute values); shows error if required attributes missing
F23-Form validation: at least one unique-generating segment required (category_path or serial); max total length 64; no duplicate segment types that cause ambiguity
F23-zh-CN/en-US i18n for all labels, placeholder text, validation messages, and button text
F23-On save: POST /api/v1/material-libraries with library data including embedded rule_config, then display the created library with its V1 rule version

sprints.title: Frontend: Material Library Detail - Code Rule View, Version Management, and Edit
features: F23-Material library detail page with tabbed layout: 基础信息, 编码规则, 规则版本, 物料列表, 重编码记录, 编码映射
F23-编码规则 tab: display current active rule version with parsed segments visualization, serial number strategy summary, effective time, created_by; action buttons: 编辑规则, 查看历史版本, 导出编码映射
F23-规则版本 tab: paginated table of rule versions (version_no, rule_name, status badge, effective_time, created_by, change_reason); click version to view full segment detail

F23-编辑规则 page: load current rule segments into segment builder; user can modify/add/remove segments; must fill change_reason; select effective mode (仅新增物料生效 / 全部物料重编码 / 选中物料重编码); preview button generates example code
F23-Effective mode logic: 仅新增生效 just creates and activates new version; 全部重编码/选中重编码 creates draft version and prompts for preview
F23-Rule version status badges: 草稿 (gray), 启用 (green), 已停用 (red), 启用失败 (orange)
F23-Permission: only super_admin or library admin can edit rules; regular users see read-only view
F23-zh-CN/en-US i18n throughout all tabs, forms, and messages

sprints.title: Frontend: Batch Recoding Preview, Execution, and Code Mapping
features: F23-重编码预览 page: triggered after editing rule and selecting 全部重编码/选中重编码; displays summary header (total materials, expected success count, expected failure count) with error breakdown by type (缺少属性, 编码冲突, 类目编码缺失)

F23-Preview data table: columns for material_name, specification, category_path, old_code, new_code, status (通过/失败), failure_reason; paginated with 50 rows per page; status-colored rows (green for pass, red for fail)
F23-Download preview: export preview results as CSV with all columns
F23-Execution confirmation: prominent confirm button with library-name and material-count; show warning about external system impact

F23-重编码记录 tab: list of code change batches with batch_id, old_version, new_version, change_mode, total/success/failed counts, status, created_by, created_at; click to view batch detail with all change details
F23-编码映射 tab: search/filterable table of code mappings (old_code, new_code, material_name, batch_id, change_time); pagination; export to Excel
F23-Rollback: per-batch rollback button with confirmation dialog showing risk warning about external system references
F23-Loading states and progress indication during recode execution (especially for large batches)

sprints.title: Frontend: Recode Integration and Code Rule Wizard Polish
features: F23-Integrate code generation into material creation flow: when creating a material in a library with auto_code_enabled, automatically call the code generation engine to assign material_code; show the generated code in the material form before save
F23-Code rule segment builder UX polish: drag-to-reorder segments; segment type icons; inline help tooltips explaining each segment type; validation error highlighting on specific segments
F23-Attribute code mapping table: autocomplete for attribute names from existing attributes, value-to-code mapping with bulk import from CSV
F23-Serial number scope preview: show current serial values for each scope key before creation

F23-Conflict detection UX: when code conflict is detected during recode preview, highlight affected rows in red with specific conflict details; block execution if conflicts exist unless user explicitly forces (with extra confirmation)
F23-Code mapping export: full-featured export with date range filter, batch filter, old_code/new_code search, and format selection (CSV/Excel)
F23-i18n complete coverage: zh-CN and en-US for every label, button, message, table header, validation error, status badge, and empty state in all code rule and recode pages
F23-Responsive layout and mobile-friendly considerations for list views

sprints.title: Global Dark Theme Adaptation for Feature Pages
features: Replace hardcoded light-theme Tailwind gray/white classes in functional TSX pages with the existing CSS variable utilities used by TraceDebugPage, including bg-background, bg-card, bg-muted, bg-accent, text-foreground, text-muted-foreground, border-border, and ring-ring where appropriate.
Cover Standard Management pages: category library, category, product name, attribute, and brand pages.
Cover Material Management pages: material library and materials pages.
Cover Application Workflow pages: category application, material code application, stop purchase application, and stop use application pages.
Cover System Administration pages: users, roles, permissions, system info, reason options, and approval mode pages.
Cover AI Management pages: providers, capability mappings, and token usage pages.
Cover Rule Engine pages: rule categories and rule list/create/edit pages.
Do not change API behavior, routing, data fetching, permissions, form logic, or the already-completed TraceDebugPage and MainLayout dark-theme implementation.

sprints.title: Permission Config UI: Chinese Operation Labels
features: Replace raw API path + HTTP method display in PermissionConfig.tsx with Chinese operation labels (view/create/update/delete)
Add i18n permission label translations in i18n.ts for zh-CN and en-US
Catalog names follow the current i18n language setting (zh-CN show Chinese, en-US show English)
Do not change backend API behavior or permission logic

sprints.title: Category Library and Category CRUD APIs
features: Implement backend CRUD APIs for category libraries: GET/POST /api/v1/category-libraries, GET/PUT/DELETE /api/v1/category-libraries/{id}.

Implement backend create/update/delete APIs for categories: POST /api/v1/categories, PUT /api/v1/categories/{id}, DELETE /api/v1/categories/{id}; keep existing GET /api/v1/categories behavior compatible.
Register the new category library and category write APIs in PERMISSION_CATALOG with list/create/update/delete operation mappings.
Connect CategoryLibraryList.tsx to the category library APIs with DataTable listing, create/edit dialogs, delete confirmation, empty state, and success/error feedback.
Connect CategoryList.tsx to the category create/update/delete APIs with category library selection through category_library_id.
Add zh-CN and en-US i18n keys for category library and category CRUD labels, validation, errors, and operation feedback.
Create or adjust database initialization/migration only if the CategoryLibrary or Category persistence model is missing required fields.
Keep out of scope: frontend tree visualization, category-material association logic, and fine-grained permission enforcement beyond existing logged-in access.

sprints.title: Category Management Tree View and Bulk Import (Frontend + Backend)
features: F24-Backend bulk import API: POST /api/v1/categories/bulk-import accepting CSV file or JSON array of {一级类目, 二级类目, 三级类目} entries; validates hierarchy (一级 required, 二级/三级 optional), detects duplicates, creates missing categories, returns structured result with success count, skipped count, and error list
F24-Downloadable CSV template: GET /api/v1/categories/template returns a CSV file with headers 一级类目, 二级类目, 三级类目 and 3 example rows

F24-Frontend tree display: Ant Design Tree component showing category hierarchy with expand/collapse, lazy loading for large trees, inline search filter, and selection for category selection workflows
F24-Frontend bulk import page: upload CSV dialog with drag-and-drop zone, column preview table, validation results before confirm, and batch execute with progress indicator

F24-AI one-click import: popup dialog with large textarea (10+ lines visible, scrollable), auto-focus on cursor, placeholder text with usage hints, send button that calls the Category Recognition Agent backend
F24-AI import result handling: parse agent response, show structured preview with recognized categories in tree format, allow user to edit/confirm before batch creation
F24-zh-CN and en-US i18n for all labels, button text, validation messages, and empty states
F24-Super admin only for bulk import and AI import; regular users have read-only tree view access

sprints.title: Backend Category Recognition Agent
features: F25-Sync endpoint: POST /api/v1/ai/category-recognition/recognize accepting a JSON body with {text: string, category_library_id?: number}; returns {categories: [{level1, level2?, level3?, confidence}], suggestions: string[]}
F25-Async endpoint: POST /api/v1/ai/category-recognition/recognize-async accepting same body; returns batch job id; client polls GET /api/v1/ai/category-recognition/jobs/:id for result
F25-Batch endpoint: POST /api/v1/ai/category-recognition/batch recognizing up to 100 text entries in a single call; returns array of results with job_id for tracking

F25-AsyncOpenAI integration: calls the configured AI provider with system prompt instructing the model to parse natural language product descriptions and map them to the existing category hierarchy; uses capability: category_recognition from the LLM gateway
F25-Configurable model: reads from ai_agent_config table (provider, model_name, api_key, base_url); falls back to qwen3.6-plus as default; supports override via request parameter

F25-System prompt engineering: model receives category hierarchy context (up to 50 top-level categories with their subcategories), examples of correct mappings, and instructions to return structured JSON

F25-Response parsing: robust JSON extraction from LLM response with fallback to regex parsing; returns confidence score (0.0-1.0) per category; handles ambiguous input by returning multiple candidate paths
F25-Error handling: timeout after 30s, retry once on 5xx, return structured error with fallback suggestions; log all calls to AITracer
F25-Pydantic v2 schemas: CategoryRecognitionRequest, CategoryRecognitionResponse, CategoryRecognitionBatchRequest, CategoryRecognitionJob, CategoryRecognitionJobResult

sprints.title: AI Agent Configuration in AI Management
features: F26-Backend data model: ai_agent_config table (id, config_key, provider, model_name, base_url, api_key_encrypted, temperature, max_tokens, timeout, enabled, created_at, updated_at); supports multiple named configs for different agent roles
F26-Backend API: GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/v1/ai/agent-configs; PATCH /api/v1/ai/agent-configs/:id/toggle; GET /api/v1/ai/agent-configs/:id/test for connection test
F26-Frontend AI Agent Configuration page under AI Management navigation: list of agent configurations with name, provider badge, model, enabled status, last test time

F26-Provider presets: dropdown selector with built-in presets for Qwen (千问/DashScope), DeepSeek, Moonshot (月之暗面/Kimi), OpenAI, and custom; selecting a preset auto-fills base_url and displays model recommendations

F26-Model selection: dropdown with common models per provider (qwen-max, qwen-plus, qwen-turbo for DashScope; deepseek-chat, deepseek-reasoner for DeepSeek; moonshot-v1-8k, moonshot-v1-32k for Moonshot), plus manual input option for custom model names
F26-API key input: password-type input with masked display by default; show/hide toggle; connection test on save validates the key against the provider endpoint
F26-Advanced settings: temperature slider (0-2), max_tokens input (1-32000), timeout input (5-120s)

F26-System-wide application: AI Agent Configuration drives all AI features including category recognition (F25), material analysis, attribute recommendation, and any future LLM-powered features; capability-to-agent-config mapping in the configuration
F26-Zh-CN and en-US i18n for all labels, provider names, model names, validation messages, and status text
F26-Super admin only; non-super_admin users see read-only view

sprints.title: Backend: Role Code Auto-Generation, Material Library Admin Single-Select, and Category Library Association
features: F27-Backend role code sequence table: role_code_sequence (id, current_value, updated_at); initialized with the highest existing role code number; concurrency-safe with row-level lock on sequence reads

F27-Role code auto-generation: on role creation, fetch and increment current_value from role_code_sequence with FOR UPDATE; format as ROLE_### (zero-padded to 3 digits, supports overflow to 4+ digits); return generated code in role creation response
F27-Backend role CRUD update: POST /api/v1/roles accepts optional role_code (ignored, auto-generated); role code displayed as read-only in role list/detail responses

F28-Extend material_library model: add material_library_admin_id (nullable FK to role, single admin), add category_library_id (nullable FK to category_library); update database migration for both fields

F28-Extend material_library API: POST /api/v1/material-libraries accepts material_library_admin_id and category_library_id in body; PUT /api/v1/material-libraries/:id updates both fields; GET /api/v1/material-libraries returns admin role name and category library name in response

F28-Frontend form update: 新建物料库 dialog includes single-select dropdown for 物料库管理员 (searchable role select, one selection only) and single-select dropdown for 关联类目库 (category library select, one selection only); edit form loads existing associations
F28-Frontend list display: material library list adds admin and category library name columns; detail view shows linked admin role and category library
F28-zh-CN and en-US i18n for new form labels, column headers, validation messages, and empty option text
F27-F28-Audit logging: all role code generation and library association changes logged to audit_log with before/after values

sprints.title: Product Name PM Code Generation and Status Management (Frontend + Backend)
features: F31-Backend model extension: extend product_name table with product_name_code (VARCHAR(12), unique, non-null, immutable after creation) and status (VARCHAR(20), default 'active', values: active/inactive); add product_name_code_sequence table (id, current_value, updated_at) initialized to highest existing counter

F31-Backend code generation: on product name creation, fetch and increment product_name_code_sequence with FOR UPDATE; format as PM######## (8-digit zero-padded, e.g., PM00000001); code is immutable after creation

F31-Backend API updates: POST /api/v1/product-names auto-assigns PM code; GET /api/v1/product-names includes code and status in list and detail responses; GET /api/v1/product-names/:id includes code and status
F31-Backend PATCH /api/v1/product-names/:id/status: toggle status between active and inactive; requires active product name for status=active transition
F31-Backend DELETE /api/v1/product-names/:id: soft delete (sets status to inactive); actual record preserved; hard delete blocked; audit_log entry for deactivation

F31-Frontend: product name list DataTable adds product_name_code column (read-only, displayed with mono font) and status column (badge with active=green, inactive=gray); code column is first or second column
F31-Frontend: create product name dialog shows auto-generated PM code as read-only text (not editable by user); form still accepts name, unit, category, attributes, etc.

F31-Frontend: status toggle in list row actions or inline switch that calls PATCH /api/v1/product-names/:id/status; confirmation dialog for deactivating (switching to inactive); toast feedback on success/failure
F31-Frontend: delete action in row actions calls soft delete endpoint; confirmation dialog with product name name; row removed from list on success
F31-Frontend: filter by status in product name list (all/active/inactive tabs or dropdown); inactive product names are hidden by default with option to show
F31-zh-CN and en-US i18n for code column header (品名编码), status labels (启用/禁用, active/inactive), toggle confirm messages, and soft delete confirmation
F31-Extend existing product name create/edit pages to include code display and status management without changing other business logic

sprints.title: Category Management UI Layout Refactor to Material Management Style
features: F30-Refactor category list page: adopt the same page structure as the material management list page -- top page header with 模块名称 (类目管理) and 新建类目 action button, followed by search/filter bar, then DataTable, then pagination, consistent with material management patterns

F30-Replace current category form with modal dialogs matching material management dialogs: use the same Dialog or Modal component, same field layout, same validation, same submit/cancel button structure, same overlay brightness
F30-Apply dark-theme CSS variable utilities (bg-background, bg-card, text-foreground, border-border, etc.) to category pages consistent with other feature pages
F30-Consistent column styling: category table columns use the same header styling, row hover effects, and cell padding as material management table
F30-Consistent empty state: match the empty state design (icon, message, action button) used in material management and other standard management pages
F30-Consistent search/filter bar: use the same search input component and filter dropdown styling as material management page
F30-Consistent pagination: use the same pagination component and styling as material management page
F30-Ensure category creation/editing UX flow matches material creation/editing flow: open dialog, fill form, submit, show loading state, show success toast, refresh list
F30-zh-CN and en-US i18n: ensure all labels, placeholders, button text, validation messages, and empty states are consistent with the rest of the UI
F30-Do not change backend APIs, routing logic, permission checks, or data fetching behavior -- only refactor frontend layout and component patterns

sprints.title: Material Library Permission Isolation (Backend + Frontend)
features: F29-Backend API filtering: GET /api/v1/material-libraries automatically filters results to only libraries where the current user has admin role (material_library_admin_id matches a role assigned to the user); super_admin users bypass filter and see all libraries
F29-Backend material list filtering: GET /api/v1/materials automatically filters results to only materials in libraries where the current user has admin role; super_admin bypass
F29-Backend material detail/detail APIs: verify the material's library is accessible to the current user before returning data; return 403 if inaccessible

F29-Backend create/update constraints: POST/PUT /api/v1/materials and POST/PUT /api/v1/material-libraries verify the user has admin rights to the target library; non-admins cannot create materials in libraries they do not administer

F29-Frontend sidebar filtering: when rendering the material library navigation entries, show only libraries accessible to the current user (matching backend filter); super_admin sees all entries with a visual indicator
F29-Frontend material library list: the material library list page shows only accessible libraries; non-admin users see a filtered list with no indication that other libraries exist
F29-Frontend material list: material list pages filter by the accessible libraries; if user has no admin role for any library, show empty state with appropriate message
F29-Frontend create material flow: when creating a new material, the library selection dropdown shows only accessible libraries; user cannot see or select inaccessible libraries
F29-Frontend permission indicators: in list views, show a badge or icon indicating the user's relationship to the library (admin / read-only / no access) if applicable
F29-zh-CN and en-US i18n for empty state messages explaining why a user sees no libraries, access denied messages, and library access role labels
F29-Remove any hardcoded library references or demo data that bypass the permission filter
F29-Frontend test coverage: Playwright tests verifying that a non-super_admin user sees only their assigned library/libraries and cannot access other libraries' data
